skills.name: Heal
skills.description: Restores the HP of a designated party member. The amount of HP restored depends on the caster's healing values.
skills.effect_text:
Heal Factor: CaptionRatio2 %
Corrupted Sphere Skill Factor CaptionRatio3 %
[Heal: Overload] increases SP consumption by +50% per stack

skills.name: Cure
skills.description: Removes all removable debuffs affecting the designated party member. Increases SP consumption when Cure is used continuously
skills.effect_text:
Chance to remove debuff:  CaptionRatio %
Increase SP consumption by 50% per each [Cure: Overload] stack
[Cure: Overload] Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Fade
skills.description: Erases the threat of monsters making them stop any attacks on you.

skills.name: Guardian Saint
skills.effect_text:
Guardian Saint Duration: 30 minutes
Healing: + CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Smite
skills.description: Strongly smackdown enemy. Deals 50% additional damage to Mutant and Devil-type enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Cure: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the chance for [Cure] to remove additional debuffs by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Heal: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the heal factor of [Heal] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Cleric: Healing
attributes.description: * Increases Healing by 2% per attribute level

attributes.name: Heal: Linger
attributes.description:
* Applies a buff that continuously restores the HP of allies healed with Heal (except Corrupted Sphere) or Mass Heal

* The buff lasts for 10 seconds and restores HP in a value equal to [attribute level x 5]% of your Healing stat

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Guardian Saint: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Guardian Saint]'s healing increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Property Change: Physical
attributes.description:
* Cleric class' stat growth rate and attack skill property changes.

* Property of Cleric class attack skill is changed to [Physical] - [Strike].

* INT -> STR, SPR -> DEX

attributes.name: [Arts] Cloth Mastery: Healing
attributes.description:
* Healing increases by 5% when equipping 4 Cloth-type armor

* (Basic ATK is the character's ATK without any buff effects applied to it. The highest value between Physical and Magic attack is applied.)

attributes.name: [Arts] Heal: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Heal] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Smite: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Smite] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Fade: Shift
attributes.description:
* Instead of the original [Fade], you become invincible for 0.5 seconds. Also, damage received by enemies decrease by 15% for 12 seconds and amount of heal received increase by 15%.

*Apply to yourself only

attributes.name: Guardian Saint: Faith
attributes.description: * Removes increase Healing effect of [Guardian Saint] and decreases Healing of character by 80%, but increases skill final damage by 10% for 30 minutes

attributes.name: Heal: Remove Targeting
attributes.description:
* Instantly applies Heal to yourself only when using [Heal].

*[Heal: Treat Urgent Target] attribute and group attribute.

attributes.name: Heal: Treat Urgent Target
attributes.description: Heal applies to the target with low HP, Heal rate applies by 50% of the existing recovery amount.

attributes.name: Heal: Corrupted Sphere
attributes.description:
* Loses power to heal and give non-property magic damage at a maximum of 10 targets(object included) at the front straight line. Additionally applies continuous damage to the damaged enemy for 5 seconds.

Attack : (Healing * 7) + (Magic Attack * 0.3) (Attack increases by 150% when the target is 3 or less)

Areas other than Town: Attribute ON/OFF cooldown: 1 minute(Attribute does not activate in PvP areas)

attributes.name: Heal: Corrupted Sphere Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Heal: Corrupted Sphere] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Heal: Corrupted Sphere Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Heal: Corrupted Sphere] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Property Change: Magic
attributes.description:
* Cleric class' stat growth rate and attack skill property changes.

* Property of Cleric class attack skill is changed to [Magic] - [Holy].

* STR -> INT, DEX -> SPR

attributes.name: Property Change: Magic Enhance
attributes.description:
* Cleric's SPR increases Magic Attack instead of Magic Critical Attack.

* Cleric's INT increases Magic Critical Attack instead of Magic Attack.

attributes.name: Smite: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Smite] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level
